editNotes.title: Edit interview
editNotes.limitedEditText: Only the title, notes and internal notes can be edited. To change the date, time or other details, please cancel this interview and create a new one.
editNotes.titleFieldPlaceholder: E.g.: Technical interview - Full Stack Developer
editNotes.titleFieldHint: The title will be used in the subject line of the emails
editNotes.notesFieldHint: An email will automatically be sent to the candidate and invitees to inform them of the change.
editNotes.internalNotesPlaceholder: Internal notes visible only to the HR team...
editNotes.internalNotesHint: These notes are visible only to the HR team and will not be shared with the candidate or invitees.

cancel.title: Cancel interview
cancel.reasonRequiredError: Please provide the reason for cancellation
cancel.warningText: This action will permanently cancel the interview. An email will automatically be sent to the candidate and invitees to inform them of the cancellation.
cancel.reasonPlaceholder: E.g.: Candidate unavailable, decision postponed, etc.

createSimple.locationRequiredError: Location is required for an in-person interview
createSimple.meetingLinkRequiredError: Meeting link is required for an online interview
createSimple.futureDateError: The interview date must be in the future
createSimple.titleFieldPlaceholder: E.g.: Technical interview - Full Stack Developer
createSimple.titleFieldHint: The title will be used in the subject of the invitation email
createSimple.locationPlaceholder: E.g.: 123 Rue de la Paix, Paris
createSimple.notesFieldPlaceholder: E.g.: Technical interview with the development team
createSimple.internalNotesFieldPlaceholder: E.g.: Candidate recommended by the manager, priority profile...
createSimple.internalNotesHint: These notes are visible only to the HR team and will not be shared with the candidate or invitees.
createSimple.inviteesFieldPlaceholder: Email of the person to invite
createSimple.sendEmailLabel: Automatically send an email to the candidate and invitees

reschedule.title: Reschedule interview
reschedule.dateTimeRequiredError: Please select a date and a time
reschedule.futureDateError: The new date must be in the future
reschedule.infoText: A notification email will automatically be sent to the candidate and invitees to inform them of the change.
